scripts.build: npm run build -w @earendil-works/pi-ai && npm run build -w @earendil-works/pi-agent-core && npm run build -w @earendil-works/pi-tui && npm run build -w @magenta/harness && npm run build -w @magenta/memory && npm run build -w @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent
scripts.check: npm run check:docs && biome check --write --error-on-warnings . && npm run check:pinned-deps && npm run check:ts-imports && npm run check:shrinkwrap && node scripts/tsc.mjs --noEmit && npm run check:browser-smoke
scripts.check:release: npm run check:docs && biome check --error-on-warnings . && npm run check:pinned-deps && npm run check:ts-imports && npm run check:shrinkwrap && node scripts/tsc.mjs --noEmit && npm run check:browser-smoke
scripts.test: npm run test:scripts && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && npm install --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && npm install --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts
scripts.version:major: npm version major -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && npm install --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run check
